title: hs:spec workspace DEC ledger block frontmatter
description: Shape of one --- fenced YAML frontmatter block in <root>/docs/product/decisions.md, as appended by dec_ledger.py. Distinct from the harness architecture register's own YAML SSOT schema (docs/decisions.yaml) -- see references/dec-ledger.md.

id.description: Parent-free, globally monotonic within the workspace ledger (grep max heading +1, never reused).

ts.description: Machine-resolved UTC ISO-8601 instant of allocation.

affects.description: Comma-separated list of affected spec-graph ids (PRD/epic/story/goal); may be empty.
